creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Finally, i have done the  work with bsd.fpc.mk file, i uploaded a
tar.bz2 file at

http://people.freebsd.org/~acm/ports/freepascal/

It contains all fpc stuff including bsd.fpc.mk file and a bsd.port.mk
patch file, i'll assign this PR to portmgr because now it's a portmgr
territory ;)

Greetings
ACM.
